Safe, supportive fitness through every trimester

Safe Exercises During Each Trimester of Pregnancy

2026-07-08

Exercise during pregnancy offers numerous benefits for both mother and baby.

First Trimester

Maintain pre-pregnancy fitness with walking, swimming, and light yoga.

Second Trimester

Continue with modified movements as your body changes.

Third Trimester

Focus on gentle movement and preparation for labor.

Always consult your healthcare provider before starting any exercise program.

This article is for general informational purposes only and is not medical advice. It is not a substitute for professional diagnosis or treatment. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider about your individual situation, especially before making significant changes to your diet or exercise routine.
